title: Methods, architectures, apparatuses and systems for conditional non-serving cell signal-to-interference-plus-noise (sinr) measurements in subband non-overlapping full duplex (sbfd) and dynamic time division duplex (tdd) communications
abstract: In one embodiment, a wireless transmit/receive unit (WTRU) may receive configuration information indicating a set of channel state information interference measurement (CSI-IM) resources associated with one or more sub-bands. The WTRU 102 may receive information indicating first UL muting occasions in a first (e.g., serving) cell. The WTRU may measure a first interference signal strength using the CSI-IM resources associated with the first UL muting occasions. The WTRU may send a request associated with UL muting in a second (e.g., non-serving) cell based on the first interference signal strength. The WTRU may receive information indicating second UL muting occasions in the second cell. The WTRU may measure a reference signal received power (RSRP) and/or a second interference signal strength using the CSI-IM resources associated with the second UL muting occasions. The WTRU may report the RSRP and/or measurement information associated with the second interference signal strength.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS What is claimed is: 1. A wireless transmit/receive unit (WTRU). comprising: a processor, a memory. and a transceiver which are configured to: receive configuration information indicating a set of channel state information interference measurement (CSI-IM) time and/or frequency resources associated with one or more sub-bands, receive information indicating one or more first uplink (UL) muting occasions in a first cell, measure a first interference signal strength using the set of CSI-IM time and/or frequency resources associated with the one or more first UL muting occasions, send information indicating a first request associated with UL muting in a second cell based on the first interference signal strength, receive information indicating one or more second UL muting occasions in the second cell, measure a reference signal received power (RSRP) and/or a second interference signal strength using the set of CSI-IM time and/or frequency resources associated with the one or more second UL muting occasions, and report information indicating (i) an identifier of the second cell and (ii) the RSRP and/or measurement information associated with the second interference signal strength. 2. The WTRU of claim 1, wherein the processor, the memory, and the transceiver are configured to report a first signal-to-interference-plus-noise ratio (SINR) measurement and/or a first crosslayer interference (CLI) measurement based on the first interference signal strength. 3. The WTRU of any of claims 1-2, wherein the processor, the memory, and the transceiver are configured to measure the first interference signal strength using a first subset of the set of CSI- IM time and/or frequency resources which are at least partially overlapped with a first set of UL time and/or frequency resources associated with the one or more first UL muting occasions. 4. The WTRU of any of claims 1-3, wherein the processor, the memory, and the transceiver are configured to measure the RSRP and/or the second interference signal strength using a second subset of the set of CSI-IM time and/or frequency resources which are at least partially overlapped with a second set of UL time and/or frequency resources associated with the one or more second UL muting occasions. 5. The WTRU of any of claims 1-4, wherein the processor, the memory, and the transceiver are configured to: determine a first signal-to-interference-plus-noise ratio (SINR) measurement and/or a first cross-layer interference (CLI) measurement based on the first interference signal strength, and wherein the processor, the memory, and the transceiver are configured to send the information indicating the first request based on any of the first SINR measurement being lower than a first threshold, and/or the first CLI measurement being greater than a second threshold. 6. The WTRU of any of claims 1-5, wherein the measurement information includes any of a signal -to-interference-plus-noise ratio (SINR) measurement and/or cross-layer interference received signal strength indicator (CLI-RSSI) based on the second interference signal strength. 7. The WTRU of any of claims 1-6, wherein the processor, the memory, and the transceiver are configured to send information indicating a second request to switch to the second cell based on the RSRP being greater than a third threshold. 8. The WTRU of any of claims 1-6, wherein the processor, the memory, and the transceiver are configured to send information indicating a preference to remain in the first cell based on the RSRP being less than a third threshold. 9. The WTRU of any of claims 1-8, wherein the processor, the memory, and the transceiver are configured to receive downlink control information (DCI) associated with a group of WTRUs, wherein the DCI includes information indicating the one or more first UL muting occasions, 10. The WTRU of claim 9, wherein the one or more first UL muting occasions are associated with a first set of UL time and/or frequency resources, and the set of CSI-IM time and/or frequency resources used to measure the first interference signal strength correspond to the first set of UL time and/or frequency resources. 11. The WTRU of claim 9, wherein the one or more second UL muting occasions are associated with a second set of UL time and/or frequency resources, and the set of CSI-IM time and/or frequency resources used to measure the RSRP and/or the second interference signal strength correspond to the second set of UL time and/or frequency resources. 12. The WTRU of any of claims 1-11, wherein the identifier of the second cell is a primary 7 cell index or a cell identifier. 13. A method implemented by a wireless transmit/receive unit (WTRU), the method comprising: receiving configuration information indicating a set of channel state information interference measurement (CSI-IM) time and/or frequency resources associated with one or more sub-bands; receiving information indicating one or more first uplink (UL) muting occasions in a first cell; measuring a first interference signal strength using the set of CSI-IM time and/or frequency resources associated with the one or more first UL muting occasions; sending information indicating a first request associated with UL muting in a second cell based on the first interference signal strength; receiving information indicating one or more second UL muting occasions in the second cell; measuring a reference signal received power (RSRP) and/or a second interference signal strength using the set of CSI-IM time and/or frequency resources associated with the one or more second UL muting occasions; and reporting information indicating (i) an identifier of the second cell and (ii) the RSRP and/or measurement information associated with the second interference signal strength. 14. The method of claim 13, further comprising: reporting a first signal-to-interference-plus-noise ratio (SINR) measurement and/or a first cross-layer interference (CL1) measurement based on the first interference signal strength. 15. The method of any of claims 13-14, further comprising: measuring the first interference signal strength using a first subset of the set of CSI-IM time and/or frequency resources which are at least partially overlapped with a first set of UL time and/or frequency resources associated with the one or more first UL muting occasions. 16. The method of any of claims 13-15, further comprising: measuring the RSRP and/or the second interference signal strength using a second subset of the set of CSI-IM time and/or frequency resources which are at least partially overlapped with a second set of UL time and/or frequency resources associated with the one or more second UL muting occasions. 17. The method of any of claims 13-16. further comprising: 

 determining a first signal-to-interference-plus-noise ratio (SINR) measurement and/or a first cross-layer interference (CLI) measurement based on the first interference signal strength, and wherein the information indicating the first request is sent based on any of the first SINR measurement being lower than a first threshold, and/or the first CLI measurement being greater than a second threshold. 18. The method of any of claims 13-17, wherein the measurement information includes any of a signal -to-interference-plus-noise ratio (SINR) measurement and/or cross-layer interference received signal strength indicator (CLI -RS SI) based on the second interference signal strength. 19. The method of any of claims 13-18, further comprising: sending information indicating a second request to switch to the second cell based on the RSRP being greater than a third threshold. 20. The method of any of claims 13-19, further comprising: sending information indicating a preference to remain in the first cell based on the RSRP being less than a third threshold. 21. The method of any of claims 12-20, further comprising: receiving downlink control information (DCI) associated with a group of WTRUs, wherein the DCI includes information indicating the one or more first UL muting occasions, 22. The method of claim 21, wherein the one or more first UL muting occasions are associated with a first set of UL time and/or frequency resources, and the set of CSI-IM time and/or frequency resources used to measure the first interference signal strength correspond to the first set of UL time and/or frequency resources. 23. The method of claim 21, wherein the one or more second UL muting occasions are associated with a second set of UL time and/or frequency resources, and the set of CSI-IM time and/or frequency resources used to measure the RSRP and/or the second interference signal strength correspond to the second set of UL time and/or frequency resources. 24. The method of any of claims 13-23, wherein the identifier of the second cell is a primary cell index or a cell identifier. 74 SUBSTITUTE SHEET (RULE 26)
